commands.review_summary:
The PR adds label-aware PR intake triage that emits `requires_human` for metadata-only ClawSweeper labels while preserving repair jobs for objective blockers, plus two regression tests for those cases.

Reproducibility: not applicable. for the item as a feature PR; the diff adds a new intake classification path rather than fixing a reproduced current-main bug. The PR's focused tests model the intended metadata-only and repairable-blocker cases, but no real dry-run proof is supplied.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Contributor-supplied real behavior proof is still required, and the current conflict needs a careful rebase that preserves adjacent main behavior before normal maintainer review.

target.title: Separate human-only PR intake signals
target.body:
## Update: focused replacement for #307 close reason

This PR has been amended so it no longer repeats the closed #307 branch unchanged.

What changed versus #307:

```text
- removed watch-silence / fingerprint state entirely;
- kept only the useful human-only classification idea;
- added regression coverage for the metadata-only path;
- added regression coverage proving objective failed checks still create repair jobs.
```

Validation:

```text
corepack pnpm run build:repair
node --test test/repair/pr-repair-intake.test.ts
```

Result:

```text
build:repair: passed
pr-repair-intake.test.ts: 4/4 tests passed
```

The updated patch-id differs from #307, and `src/repair/pr-repair-intake.ts` no longer contains watch/silence/fingerprint logic.
target.author: jhacarreiro
